title: Platform for creating and testing ML-based stock prediction models
author: StrangeArugala
selftext:
Hi All 👋  
  
Over the past year, I’ve been exploring how machine learning and deep learning can be used to predict stock price movements.

I started by building my own Python-based scripts and sharing them with a few friends. Over time, as those scripts proved effective for quickly building and backtesting predictive models, I decided to turn them into a simple, intuitive platform that anyone can use.

I’m now looking for a few testers to try it out and share early feedback.  
  
If you’re interested, send me a DM!
